name: Regression
description:
Most people, when they get overwhelmed, tend to either lash out, or disassociate. Not John Shedletsky, though. He regresses back to bad old habits.

This was requested! I personally love the idea of Shedletsky regressing back into Telamon when he's overwhelmed and stressed. Thank you JayJay for the suggestion :D

Go drink water!!!
creator: Subconscious
